testcase.name: test_root_endpoint
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:976: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_snaproad_api.py:34: in test_root_endpoint data = response.json() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:980: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_update_widget_position
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_snaproad_api.py:246: in test_update_widget_position assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_all_offers

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'total_savings' in {'data': [{'business_name': 'Shell Gas Station', 'business_type': 'gas', 'created_by': 'business', 'description': 'Save on your next fill-up!', ...}, {'business_name': 'Starbucks Downtown', 'business_type': 'cafe', 'created_by': 'business', 'description': 'Get a free size upgrade!', ...}, {'business_name': 'Quick Shine Car Wash', 'business_type': 'carwash', 'created_by': 'business', 'description': 'Premium wash at basic price', ...}, {'business_name': 'SnapRoad Partner Deal', 'business_type': 'restaurant', 'created_by': 'admin', 'description': 'Exclusive SnapRoad member discount!', ...}, {'business_name': 'BP Gas Station', 'business_type': 'gas', 'created_by': 'business', 'description': 'Save 10¢/gallon with SnapRoad', ...}], 'discount_info': {'free_discount': 6, 'premium_discount': 18}, 'success': True, 'user_plan': 'basic'}
